creator: rfg@tristatelogic.com
text:
Please close, delete, destroy, shread, and otherwise launch into the outer
Oort cloud this bug report.

Further investigation reveals that the problem reported was actually caused
by good old-fashioned pilot error.

If possible, please airbrush this PR out of the pages of history in order
to minimize further embarassment to the original submitter (i.e. me).

Thank you, and my apologies to all concerned.
